parsed_output.justification: Justin's behavior is highly characteristic of the Tanner; he admits to lying about his Seer claim and explicitly suggests that he might be the Tanner to steer the vote away from himself and toward Mike. Mike claims to be the Seer but provides a logically flawed explanation regarding the center cards ('I saw two good things in the middle. So there is two werewolves'), which suggests he is bluffing. Since Justin is likely the Tanner and Mike's claim is suspicious, Mike is the most probable Werewolf.
